screen.archetypes.picker.prompt: Choose deliberately — changing your mind later has a price.
screen.archetypes.picker.fork_hint: Pick one path — the other locks.
screen.archetypes.confirm.title: Become a %s?
screen.archetypes.confirm.body: You will start as a %s and can grow into a %s. Changing your path later will come at a price.
screen.archetypes.tree.title: %s Skill Tree
screen.archetypes.tree.reset.tooltip: Creative only. Clears your choice so you can pick again.
message.archetypes.night_form.locked: The night still holds you — %s min
screen.archetypes.tree.rate.tooltip: Advancements make you level faster: each one you earn permanently boosts the XP this bar collects by 2.5%, up to triple speed at 80 advancements.
screen.archetypes.tree.legend.capstones: Purple-ringed nodes are capstones. Capstones lock each other out — pick one.
screen.archetypes.tree.legend.elements: An Elementalist commits to one element: choosing Fireball locks Ice Blast, and each element's capstones follow.
screen.archetypes.tree.legend.reset: To reset your nodes, brew an Awkward Potion with a Red Mushroom into a Potion of Amnesia. Resetting costs part of your levels; the stronger brew forgets your archetype entirely.
screen.archetypes.tree.rate.tooltip.coun: You have earned %s — that is x%s right now.
screen.archetypes.tree.mastered: Full potential unlocked — you are now a true %s.
node.archetypes.crusher.clinch.desc: While your hands are bare: you receive and apply 50/100% less knockback.
node.archetypes.crusher.sunder.desc: Your hits pierce armor like Breach: level I/II with the mace, II/IV with bare fists. Stacks with the enchantment.
node.archetypes.crusher.bare_knuckle.des: Mace damage increased by 0.5/1/1.5/2 hearts. Unarmed damage increased by 1/2/3/4 hearts.
node.archetypes.crusher.iron_skin.desc: While your hands are bare: +1/2/3 armor and +1/2/3 toughness.
node.archetypes.crusher.haymaker.desc: With bare fists: one punch for x4.0 damage, Slowness VI for 1.5 seconds, and a Knockback II send-off. Only starts its cooldown if it lands. 20s cooldown.
node.archetypes.crusher.meteor.desc: Mace smashes deal 0.25/0.5 hearts of bonus damage per block fallen, like Density. Stacks with the enchantment.
node.archetypes.crusher.shockwave.desc: A mace hit landed while falling deals its full damage to everything within 2/4 blocks of the target.
node.archetypes.crusher.earth_shatter.de: If Quake hits no creature: refund 33/66/100% of its cooldown and shatter every block up to stone hardness within 2/4/6 blocks. Costs one mace durability per block broken.
node.archetypes.crusher.quake.desc: With a mace: brace for 1.5 seconds, immune to knockback, then slam for x1.5 attack damage plus 0.75 hearts per Density level and 1 heart per Meteor rank, launching hostiles upward. 30s cooldown.
node.archetypes.crusher.battle_trance.de: Every mace or fist hit banks temporary health: 0.5 heart per hit with a mace, 1 heart with bare fists. Caps at 1/2/3 hearts by rank. Starts decaying at 0.5 heart per second, 5 seconds after your last hit.
node.archetypes.verdict.not_connected: Locked — connect it to a node you own
node.archetypes.verdict.tree_full: This tree is at its point cap
node.archetypes.verdict.exclusive_taken: Locked — you chose the other capstone
node.archetypes.protector.bash.desc: With a shield in hand: shove the nearest enemy in front of you for 2.5 hearts of damage. Cooldown 7s.
node.archetypes.protector.slam.desc: The bash deals x1.33/x1.67/x2.0 damage. Its cooldown grows by 2/4/6 seconds.
node.archetypes.protector.cooldown.desc: Removes 1.2/2.4/3.6/4.8 seconds from the bash's cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.knockback.desc: The bash trades 12/24/36% damage for a much stronger shove.
node.archetypes.protector.wide.desc: The bash hits everyone in front of you. Extra targets take 50/100% damage. Ground Slam's radius grows by 1/2 blocks.
node.archetypes.protector.unbreaking.des: Blocking has a 50% chance to not damage the item you're blocking with.
node.archetypes.protector.spikes.desc: Melee attackers hitting your raised shield are spiked: Thorns V/X/XV by rank.
node.archetypes.protector.rush.desc: While blocking, press sprint to lunge forward 2/4/6 blocks. 3s cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.reflect.desc: Projectiles you block fly back at their shooter. Arrows return at x0.5 damage.
node.archetypes.protector.omni_block.des: While blocking, your shield stops attacks from every direction.
node.archetypes.protector.ground_slam.de: The bash becomes a ground slam, hitting everything within 2 blocks at full damage. Wide Swings adds 1/2 blocks to the radius.
node.archetypes.protector.braced.desc: Every hit your shield blocks shaves a second off the bash's cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.taunt.desc: The bash also makes every monster within 8 blocks attack you.
node.archetypes.slayer.slowness.desc: Sword and greatsword hits apply Slowness I/II for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.slayer.taste_of_blood.de: Kills with sword or greatsword restore 0.5/1/1.5 hearts.
node.archetypes.slayer.lunge.desc: While sprinting, sword swings fling you 1/2 blocks in the direction you're looking, including upward. 2s cooldown.
node.archetypes.slayer.blade_dance.desc: Every manual sword strike has a 25% chance to lash out at another enemy within 3.5 blocks, any direction, back included. Bladestorm doesn't count.
node.archetypes.slayer.kbres.desc: While a greatsword is in hand, you have 30/60% knockback resistance.
node.archetypes.slayer.bleed.desc: Sword hits open a wound: 0.5/1/1.5 hearts every second, for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.slayer.heavy.desc: The greatsword hits 10/20/30% harder and swings 10/20/30% slower to match.
node.archetypes.slayer.firstblood.desc: Greatsword hits against unhurt targets deal +40%.
node.archetypes.slayer.executioner.desc: Greatsword blows finish any target below 15% health outright.
node.archetypes.slayer.bloodlust.desc: Sword and greatsword kills grant Speed I for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.slayer.bladestorm.desc: With a sword: whirl for 3 seconds, striking everything within 3 blocks six times for x0.5 damage each. 45s cooldown.
node.archetypes.slayer.decimate.desc: With a greatsword: one massive cleave for x2.0 damage to everything within 3.5 blocks in front. 30s cooldown.
node.archetypes.slayer.relentless.desc: Decimate's cooldown drops to 15 seconds, Bladestorm's to 30.
node.archetypes.marksman.true_shot.desc: Your next bow/crossbow shot is unaffected by gravity and deals x2.0 damage. 20 seconds cooldown.
node.archetypes.marksman.seeker_arrow.de: True Shot now automatically shoots at nearby hostile target, passing through neutral. True Shot damage bonus removed, cooldown reduced by 10 seconds.
node.archetypes.marksman.snap_shot.desc: True Shot damage bonus increased to x4.0 and shoots an arrow immediately on use.
node.archetypes.assassin.shadow_step.des: Teleport behind the target creature up to 16 blocks away and strike it once with your dagger. Cooldown 15s.
node.archetypes.assassin.shadow_flurry.d: Shadow Step's strikes for x3.0 damage, cooldown increased to 30s.
node.archetypes.shadow.predator.desc: Kills while invisible renew the invisibility duration.
node.archetypes.shadow.last_shadow.desc: Fatal damage instead cleanses the negative effects, grants 2 seconds of immunity and casts Invisibility. Both then share a 180s cooldown.
node.archetypes.elementalist.fireball.de: Hurl a fireball that explodes in a 3x3 area: 2.5 hearts, targets set ablaze for 5 seconds. Consumes 50 mana. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.elementalist.meteorite.d: Call down a meteor fueled by your whole mana pool (100 minimum). At 100 mana: 8 hearts across 5x5 blocks and a Knockback I shove from the crater. Damage, area, knockback, size and sound all scale with the mana spent — 250 mana is x2.5 everything. Cast with Ability 4. Cost reducers refund their share after the blast. Needs open sky above the target.
node.archetypes.elementalist.flamethrowe: Hold Ability 4 to spray bolts of fire, each dealing 1 heart and igniting for 3 seconds. Costs 50 mana to ignite, then 25 mana per second held.
node.archetypes.wizard.magic_missile.des: Loose a missile that flies up to 16 blocks and deals 3 hearts of damage. Consumes 25 mana. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.wizard.seeker_missile.de: Missiles steer toward the nearest enemy, but fly 33% slower.
node.archetypes.wizard.lance.desc: Missiles pierce every enemy they pass and strike a wider path.
node.archetypes.priest.holy_light.desc: Lob a bolt of light. On impact, living creatures within 4 blocks are healed 2.5 hearts and undead take 2.5 hearts of damage. Consumes 50 mana. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.priest.renewal.desc: Holy Light also grants Regeneration for 10 seconds to non-hostiles.
node.archetypes.priest.benediction.desc: Holy Light also grants a random blessing for 10 seconds to non-hostiles: Speed, Strength, Resistance or Fire Resistance.
item.archetypes.spellcasting_tome.no_spe: Needs the Specialities mod to level Spellcasting
node.archetypes.marksman.conservation.de: Arrows have a 12.5/25/37.5/50% chance to not be consumed.
node.archetypes.marksman.pinning.desc: Arrow hits apply Slowness I/II for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.marksman.nimble_draw.des: Reduce penalty for holding the bow drawn by 33/66/100%.
node.archetypes.marksman.rapid_reload.de: Kills with crossbow makes the next reload time 25/50/75/100% shorter.
node.archetypes.marksman.combustion.desc: Hitting a burning target detonates it: everything within 3 blocks takes the arrow's full damage.
node.archetypes.marksman.focus.desc: Reduces True Shot cooldown by 10 seconds on each successful hit on any creature.
node.archetypes.marksman.acrobatics.desc: While drawing a bow, press sprint to roll 2/4 blocks forward. 8s cooldown.
node.archetypes.marksman.piercing_tips.d: Bow and crossbow shots ignore 2 points of the target's armor.
node.archetypes.shadow.umbral_sight.desc: Hostiles within 8/16 blocks are highlighted while sneaking.
node.archetypes.shadow.swift_shadow.desc: Speed penalty for sneaking is reduced by 50/100%.
node.archetypes.shadow.dark_mending.desc: Regenerate a heart every 8/6/4/2 seconds while invisible.
node.archetypes.shadow.dim_presence.desc: Reduce the range hostiles can see you while sneaking by 20/40%.
node.archetypes.shadow.cleansing_veil.de: Casting Invisibility cleanses the negative effects.
node.archetypes.shadow.first_strike.desc: Melee attacks from invisibility deal +25/50% bonus damage.
node.archetypes.shadow.bloodrush.desc: Kills while invisible grant Strength I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.shadow.ghost_armor.desc: Your armor turns invisible with you.
node.archetypes.shadow.night_stalker.des: While invisible at night, you have increased manoeuvrability.
node.archetypes.assassin.lightfoot.desc: Holding a dagger increases movement speed by 10/20%.
node.archetypes.assassin.sidestep.desc: Chance to dodge an attack while holding a dagger: 7/14/21%.
node.archetypes.assassin.crippling_poiso: Dagger hits apply Slowness I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.expose.desc: Dagger damage dealt to targets below half health increased by: 10/20/30%.
node.archetypes.assassin.venom.desc: Dagger hits apply Poison I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.blight.desc: Dagger hits apply Wither I/II for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.twin_fangs.desc: Shadow Step will also hit with the dagger held in off-hand at x0.5 efficiency.
node.archetypes.elementalist.ice_blast.d: Hurl a freezing bolt that explodes in a 3x3 area: 2 hearts and Slowness III for 4 seconds. Consumes 50 mana. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.elementalist.scorch.desc: Fireballs hit 1/2 hearts harder. The flamethrower's bolts hit 0.5/1 hearts harder.
node.archetypes.elementalist.vaporize.de: Fire projectiles boil away the water they pass over.
node.archetypes.elementalist.frostbite.d: Ice Blast applies Slowness IV/V for 5/6 seconds.
node.archetypes.elementalist.shatter.des: Slowed or freezing targets take +15/30% damage from your fire and ice projectiles.
Ice projectiles glaze the water they pass over into walkable frost.
node.archetypes.elementalist.glacial_spi: Hurl a lance of winter at one target: x2.0 Ice Blast damage, x10.0 against slowed or freezing targets, freezing them in place for 12 seconds. Cast with Ability 4. Consumes 75 mana.
node.archetypes.elementalist.blizzard.de: Call a storm: icicles rake the targeted 5x5 ground for 10 hearts over 8 seconds. Recasting moves the storm. Cast with Ability 4. Consumes 75 mana.
node.archetypes.elementalist.spellweaver: All your spells cost 10% less mana.
node.archetypes.elementalist.arcane_powe: Your fire and ice spells deal 20% more damage.
node.archetypes.wizard.mana_shield.desc: While a wand is in hand, 50% of damage taken drains mana instead of health (4 mana per heart).
node.archetypes.wizard.overwhelm.desc: +20% missile damage against anything already wounded.
node.archetypes.wizard.concussion.desc: Missiles apply Weakness I for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.wizard.shatterpoint.desc: +30% missile damage against targets at full health.
node.archetypes.wizard.mind_well.desc: Every 8th/4th missile leaves empowered, dealing +1.5 hearts of damage.
node.archetypes.priest.lumen.desc: Holy Light's healing and damage to the undead increased by 0.5/1.0 hearts.
node.archetypes.priest.fervent_cast.desc: Holy Light flies 50% faster and flatter, reaching farther.
node.archetypes.priest.mercy.desc: Holy Light's healing increased by 1/2 hearts.
node.archetypes.priest.wrath.desc: Holy Light's damage to the undead increased by 1/2 hearts.
node.archetypes.priest.immolation.desc: Holy Light sets undead enemies on fire for 3/6 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.aegis.desc: Casting Holy Light shells you with 2/4 hearts of absorption for 30 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.sanctuary.desc: Casting Holy Light shells friendly targets with 2/4 hearts of absorption for 30 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.judgement.desc: Holy Light applies Weakness I/II to undead enemies for 6 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.ascendant.desc: Multiplies Holy Light's healing and its damage to the undead by x1.25.
item.archetypes.blaze_wand.tooltip: Fire spells cost 15 less mana and deal x1.5 damage
item.archetypes.breeze_wand.tooltip: Frost spells cost 15 less mana and deal x1.5 damage
item.archetypes.holy_wand.tooltip: Priest spells cost 15 less mana and heal x1.5 stronger
item.archetypes.oracle_wand.tooltip: All spells cost 10% less mana and deal x1.5 damage
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.ligh: Target a creature up to 32 blocks away to strike it, dealing massive damage of 20 hearts. 150 mana cost. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.chai: Lightning Strike will chain to 1/2/3 nearby hostile creatures, dealing 100% of the original damage.
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.recu: Lightning will strike 1/2/3 more times for 100% of the original damage.
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.orac: Regenerate 2.5/5% of max mana per second.
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.temp: Lightning Strike becomes an AOE targeted ability and will consume mana for each additional hostile creature struck.
node.archetypes.oracle_elementalist.over: Lightning Strike damage is increased by 100%.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.magic_arma: Creates a weapon of immense power in place of your wand. 50 mana cost, 10 mana/second channel.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.magic_armo: During the Magic Armaments channel, every mana spent also provides 0.5/1 temporary health, up to 10/20.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.levitation: During the Magic Armaments channel, you are able to glide.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.ward.desc: During the Magic Armaments channel, you are immune to negative status effects.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.mind_over_: Increases the potency of Magic Armaments: the spellsword and spellbow will ignore the target's armor and their damage is doubled.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.blink.desc: Swings with the magic sword teleport you up to 8 blocks forward when not targeting any hostile creature.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.spellbow.d: Magic Armaments will now summon a bow instead of a sword.
node.archetypes.oracle_wizard.mana_sipho: Hits with the spellbow restore 50 mana.
node.archetypes.oracle_priest.aura_of_ra: Casting Holy Light will apply Aura of Radiance to yourself for 10 seconds. Undead creatures within 8 blocks take 0.5 hearts of damage every second. Friendly creatures are healed 0.5 hearts every second. Holy Light costs 100% more mana.
node.archetypes.oracle_priest.brilliance: Aura of Radiance damage/healing increased to 1/2 hearts per second.
node.archetypes.oracle_priest.beacon_of_: Aura of Radiance duration increased to 30 seconds.
node.archetypes.oracle_priest.blinding_l: Aura of Radiance afflicts nearby undead creatures with Weakness II/Slowness II while active.
Aura of Radiance grants knockback immunity to yourself.
node.archetypes.oracle_priest.retributio: Aura of Radiance grants you Strength II/Speed II while active.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.dark_ritu: Transform yourself into a creature of the night and gain new abilities. 10 seconds transformation time; after a successful channel you cannot transform back for one hour. Health regeneration is halted, but kills will restore you 25% of the target creature's maximum health.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.extra_sen: While in night form, you gain the ability to see all creatures within 32 blocks.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.night_eye: While in night form, you gain Night Vision.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.feast.des: All your attacks afflict victims with heavy blood loss, dealing 1/2 hearts of damage per second and healing you for the same amount, for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.ghost_for: While in night form, you gain a 25/50/75% chance to negate incoming damage. You gain Slow Falling. Pressing the sprint key while sneaking will fly you 2/4/6 blocks in the direction you are facing, every 2 seconds.
node.archetypes.nemesis_shadow.incorpore: While in night form, you gain knockback immunity and all projectiles begin to pass right through you.
